title: advance_diversifier_to uses DEFERRED tx for read-then-write
description: store.rs:931 calls pool.begin() (SQLite DEFERRED) for a read-then-conditionally-write sequence: SELECT diversifier_idx then conditionally UPDATE. A concurrent next_diversifier() (which uses BEGIN IMMEDIATE) can advance the index between the SELECT and the UPDATE in advance_diversifier_to, causing the monotonicity invariant to be violated — the index could be written backward. Fix: use BEGIN IMMEDIATE (or an explicit 'BEGIN IMMEDIATE' query) instead of pool.begin() in advance_diversifier_to.
